title: How a billiard hall in Paris's Belleville neighborhood became a symbol of gentrification
subhead: Every evening, a new crowd of young creatives packs M8, a billiards hall with six tables located in Paris's 19th arrondissement. As those working in the luxury industry started coming, the venue's original regulars gradually faded away.
